description: Beta patch: align npm package repository metadata with the psymoth/trellis GitHub provenance source.
changelog:
**Bug Fixes:**
- fix(release): align `psymoth` and `psymoth-core` package repository metadata with `psymoth/trellis` so npm provenance verification accepts GitHub Actions publishes.
notes: Beta patch on top of 0.6.0-beta.23. Install with `npm install -g psymoth@beta`. No migration command is required.
